Flexible Engineering Resource

Senior Engineers.
When You Need Them.

The same experienced robot programmers, PLC engineers and electricians who deliver our turnkey projects — available to your team on a flexible day rate or contract basis.

Discuss Your Requirements0121 798 9063
What We Offer

Expert Engineers,
Flexible Terms.

Sometimes you need an extra pair of highly skilled hands — not a full turnkey project. Whether you're facing a skills gap, a tight deadline, a project overrun or a period of peak demand, Duke Control Systems can provide experienced engineers on a flexible basis to work as part of your team.

These are the same senior engineers who deliver our own complex automation projects. They arrive on your site ready to contribute from day one — no lengthy onboarding, no learning curve. Just experienced professionals who have done the work before.

Available on daily, weekly or monthly contracts across the UK.

Discuss Your Requirements
Our Disciplines

Three Specialist Disciplines.
One Trusted Partner.

All engineers are Duke Control Systems employees — vetted, experienced and familiar with the demands of live manufacturing environments.

Robot Programmers

Experienced robot programmers available for commissioning support, program development, fault-finding and optimisation.

  • ABB, FANUC, KUKA & Yaskawa
  • Welding, handling & palletising
  • Commissioning & go-live support
  • Program development & optimisation
  • Fault diagnosis & breakdown support
  • Multi-robot cell experience

PLC / Software Engineers

Senior control systems engineers for PLC programming, SCADA development, commissioning and ongoing support.

  • Siemens, Rockwell & Mitsubishi
  • Schneider & Modicon
  • HMI & SCADA development
  • Safety systems & functional safety
  • Commissioning & site support
  • Legacy system upgrades

Electricians

Qualified industrial electricians for installation, termination, fault-finding and maintenance in manufacturing environments.

  • Panel wiring & termination
  • Cable installation & management
  • Field device installation
  • Fault diagnosis & breakdown cover
  • Planned preventative maintenance
  • 17th Edition qualified
When It Makes Sense

Situations Where Flexible
Resource Makes a Difference

Project Overruns

Your commissioning is running behind schedule and you need additional experienced engineers on site to recover the programme.

Skills Gaps

You have an internal team but need specialist expertise — a specific robot platform, PLC system or safety qualification — for a particular phase.

Peak Demand

You have more work than your current team can handle and need to scale up quickly without the commitment of a permanent hire.

Planned Shutdowns

Annual shutdowns and planned maintenance periods often require a temporary surge in engineering resource to complete all tasks on time.

Covering Absence

Covering maternity leave, long-term sickness or unexpected departures within your engineering team without disrupting ongoing projects.

Trying Before Committing

Working with Duke engineers on a flexible basis is a great way to experience our quality before committing to a larger turnkey project.

Why Our Engineers

Not Contractors.
Duke Engineers.

There is an important difference between a Duke Control Systems engineer and a contractor sourced through a recruitment agency. Our engineers are Duke employees — they share our values, our standards and our commitment to doing the job properly.

They have typically been involved in delivering complex turnkey projects, which means they understand systems holistically — not just the specific task in front of them. They are used to working under pressure, to tight deadlines, in live manufacturing environments.

When you take on a Duke engineer, you get someone who represents the same quality and professionalism you would expect from a Duke turnkey project.

Employed by Duke

Our engineers are Duke employees — not agency contractors. Same values, same standards, same quality.

Immediately Productive

Experienced professionals who arrive ready to contribute from day one — no lengthy onboarding required.

Fully Insured

All our engineers work under Duke Control Systems' full professional indemnity and public liability insurance.

Flexible Terms

Day rate, weekly or monthly contracts. Scale up or down as your project demands change.

"Duke Control Systems delivered a complex multi-robot commissioning project on time and within budget. Their engineers are highly experienced, professional, and their attention to detail in the commissioning phase was excellent."
Senior Project Manager — Tier 1 Automotive Supplier

Need engineers on site?

Tell us what you need — the platform, the discipline, the timescale — and we'll let you know what we can do. No obligation, no lengthy process.
